common.service_recovered: Service recovered and is now online.
common.service_unresponsive: Service is unresponsive and reporting errors.

hero.title: Observability Engineering
hero.subtitle: PulseOps is a high-fidelity monitoring platform designed for real-time infrastructure observability. Powered by an event-driven engine and high-precision telemetry streams.

intro.title: Enterprise Observability
intro.description: Modern distributed systems require more than just uptime monitoring. PulseOps provides deep operational intelligence through real-time state synchronization and heuristic health classification.
intro.goal_desc: Eliminating monitoring blind spots by providing a unified, real-time source of truth for infrastructure health and performance metrics.

capabilities.title: Platform Capabilities
capabilities.subtitle: Advanced features designed for modern engineering teams.
capabilities.realtime_desc: Active endpoint probing with high-precision health status lifecycles. Track fleet availability and latency aggregation across global clusters.
capabilities.engine_desc: Built on snapshot architecture and WebSocket synchronization. Ensures real-time state hydration and instant telemetry broadcast.
capabilities.incident_desc: Sophisticated outage detection and degraded state logic. Integrated recovery workflows and historical event tracking.
capabilities.fleet_desc: Automated stability indexing and performance scoring. Generates operational insights and infrastructure health analysis.

architecture.title: System Architecture
architecture.description: A high-fidelity observability ecosystem built on modern asynchronous primitives.
architecture.frontend_desc: Next.js 15+ App Router. Client/Server boundary optimization with React Query and Socket.io synchronization.
architecture.backend_desc: NestJS modular architecture. Specialized monitoring workers, scheduler logic, and high-performance WebSocket gateways.
architecture.telemetry_desc: Unified telemetry stream powered by an active probe engine and real-time heartbeat monitoring.
architecture.flow_desc: State synchronization lifecycle: Probe → Classification → Broadcast → Hydration.

flow.title: Monitoring Lifecycle
flow.subtitle: How PulseOps processes every single health check.

logic.title: Intelligent Logic
logic.description: The system applies sophisticated heuristics to classify endpoint health based on response characteristics.

intelligence.title: Operational Intelligence
intelligence.stability_desc: Calculated based on uptime consistency and latency jitter over a moving window.
intelligence.risk_desc: Identifies potential failure points through consecutive failure detection and performance trends.
intelligence.insight_desc: Automated generation of performance scores and infrastructure health narratives.

principles.title: Monitoring Philosophy
principles.subtitle: Engineering principles that drive PulseOps.
principles.p1_desc: Reducing noise by focusing on meaningful signals rather than raw data floods.
principles.p2_desc: Design for human understanding. Information density without chaos.
principles.p3_desc: Observability shouldn't be ugly. A beautiful UI leads to better engineering focus.

roadmap.title: Platform Roadmap
roadmap.v1_desc: Active probing, WebSocket sync, and basic observability dashboard.
roadmap.v2_desc: Historical trend analysis, custom alert rules, and team collaboration.
roadmap.v3_desc: Predictive outage detection and automated incident resolution guidance.

dashboard.title: Operations Command
dashboard.subtitle: Real-time infrastructure monitoring and system health intelligence.

metrics.latency_desc: Calculated from active healthy services only
metrics.insight_reachable: All monitored infrastructure endpoints are currently reachable and performing within operational thresholds.
metrics.insight_degraded: {count} endpoint(s) responding with degraded HTTP status. Infrastructure reachability maintained.

security.insufficient_data_desc: Comparative performance ranking requires a multi-node fleet (min. 2 services) to generate meaningful operational insights.

observability.data_stream_inactive_desc: Telemetry hasn't been updated in over 30 seconds. Automatic refetch triggered.
observability.critical_outage_desc: System is currently experiencing critical issues affecting service availability.

insights.critical_outage: {count} critical outages detected. Immediate action required.
insights.high_latency: Global latency elevated. Investigating network congestion.
insights.optimal_health: All infrastructure operating within healthy thresholds.

services.title: Services Management
services.subtitle: Real-time status overview of your global infrastructure and microservices.
services.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this service? This action cannot be undone and monitoring will stop immediately.

messages.system_status_ok: All monitored services are functioning within normal parameters.

empty_state.title: No services monitored yet
empty_state.subtitle: Start monitoring your infrastructure by adding your first service endpoint. We'll track uptime and latency in real-time.
